arts.ttl: Arsenal set Premier League points target as club legend fires warning to Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ray Parlour believes that the Gunners' hopes of Premier League title glory could rest on their trip to league leaders Liverpool in May.

arts.ttl: Arteta vows 'best is yet to come' after five years as Arsenal boss
arts.sum: Last season, Arsenal won 28 of their 38 matches and scored 91 goals, both of which were records for the club in the Premier League. I think about what is the best possible manager for Arsenal Football Club and for the players and I try to become that.

arts.ttl: Arsenal players at risk of suspension: Key Gunners quartet in danger of ban over festive period
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has some key players in danger of being suspended over Christmas

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal reach agreement to sign €60m attacker with 11 goals & 13 assists; official announcement in coming months
arts.sum: Arsenal have reportedly reached an agreement to sign Las Palmas’ attacking sensation Alberto Moleiro, according to Spanish outlet Fichajes. The Gunners are said to be ready to activate the 21-year-old’s €60 million (£50 million) release clause, with an official announcement expected in the coming months. If completed, the deal would mark a significant addition to […] The post Report: Arsenal reach agreement to sign €60m attacker with 11 goals & 13 assists; official announcement in coming months appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney tipped to 'engineer' Celtic return by Parkhead ally as firm Mikel Arteta stance can't halt Arsenal exit
arts.sum: The Scotland defender could see the Arsenal boss abruptly halt his dream move

arts.ttl: Judge in Man City's 115 charges case is an Arsenal fan and will be replaced soon
EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal in Gyokeres talks but Sesko remains top target
arts.sum: Arsenal remain in negotiations to sign Sporting CP forward Viktor Gyokeres, although RB Leipzig star Benjamin Sesko is currently their top target, FootballTransfers has been told. Sesko was heavily linked with a move to the Emirates Stadium during the most recent summer transfer window, but he opted to sign a contract extension at RB Leipzig amid significant interest from a number of top Premier League clubs.

arts.ttl: Ticket info: Arsenal v Manchester United
arts.sum: Please note that due to event requirements, those affected Gold members who will be relocated for this game and who have signed up to the Cup Scheme in Blocks 28-30 and part of block 31, will not be charged and will have the opportunity to purchase a seat in the self-serve window as advertised below on Tuesday, December 31. For any supporters whose payment card fails, you will automatically be given an opportunity to purchase your own seat in the exclusive season ticket holder priority window advertised below.

Gabriel Martinelli has scored more Premier League goals against Crystal Palace than he has vs any other opponent (5). We’re off to Selhurst Park for our second game of the week against Crystal Palace at 5.30pm on Saturday.
